name: PP 18K rose gold bracelet
subtitle: Made of solid 18K gold
description:
This watch bracelet is crafted from solid 18K rose gold. 
The color is 100% accurate, with no color discrepancies. 
The engraved stamp is perfect and fits perfectly onto the watch case. 
Compatible watch models: PP5712r,PP5711R,PP5712R,PP5980.
PP new fold‑over clasp with adjustable extension.
